title: Savory Crunchy Thai Beef Stir-fry
description: A light and sour Thai beef dish featuring pomegranate molasses, perfect for a brunch mood with its crunchy texture and paleo-friendly options.
instructions: Cut the beef into thin strips and marinate with soy sauce, pomegranate molasses, rice vinegar, sesame oil, salt, pepper, and ginger for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat. Add broccoli florets and cook until they start to brown, about 5-7 minutes.
Add sliced green onions and red bell peppers to the pan with the vegetables. Cook for another minute until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Place marinated beef into the pan in a single layer. Cover and simmer gently for about 10-12 minutes, or until the beef is cooked through. Stir occasionally.
Serve hot as a side dish or main meal with rice.
